Why Tagmark

Built Around Your Vision

From first concept to final installation, we partner with you every step of the way.

Expert Consultation

Our design specialists guide you through material selection, spatial planning, and budgeting for seamless results.

Premium Materials

All products are sourced from certified suppliers and tested to exceed industry durability and finish standards.

Professional Installation

Certified installation teams deliver precision fitting with minimal disruption to your home or commercial space.

10-Year Warranty

Every product comes with comprehensive warranty coverage for structure, finish, and UV resistance across all climates.

WPC Decking

Natural Feel, Engineered for Longevity

Our WPC decking profiles blend the warmth of natural timber with the resilience of polymer composites. Resistant to moisture, insects, and UV fading—designed to perform across coastal and inland climates.

Read More

TV Units & Feature Walls

Statement Interiors, Effortlessly Installed

Transform your living space with bespoke TV wall panels and media units. Available in a range of profiles, finishes, and colors to complement any interior design theme.

Read More

Pergolas & Structures

Extend Your Living Outdoors

From elegant garden pergolas to full outdoor entertainment structures, our engineered systems offer modular flexibility with architectural-grade finish and structural integrity.

Read More

TV Units

The Castle

R 16,700 / unit
⚡
Pay 3× R 5,566.67 with PayJustNow — interest free

Price Calculator

Area: 20 m²
Estimated total
R 16,700
Features a warm CHOCO fluted backdrop, central mounting board, and halo LED backlighting. Crafted with precision-engineered WPC fluted panels and premium board finishes, this unit delivers a statement centrepiece for any living or entertainment space.
MaterialWPC Fluted Panels + PG Bison Board
LED LightingHalo backlight included
FinishCHOCO Warm Tone
MountingWall-mounted floating
TV CompatibilityUp to 85"
Lead Time10–15 working days
Warranty5 Years structural

All TV units are custom-manufactured and delivered flat-packed with full assembly hardware. Professional installation is recommended and available nationwide. Fixing into masonry or drywall is supported. Installation guides and video walkthroughs are supplied with every order.
